title: Flavorful Dense Ukrainian Broccoli Casserole
description: A tangy and comforting Ukrainian dish featuring broccoli and render-fat, perfect for a keto-friendly meal. This casserole is dense and full of flavor, making it a great option for dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic in render-fat until softened.
Add the chopped broccoli to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked broccoli mixture, sour cream, shredded cheddar cheese, beaten eggs, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is set.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the casserole hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
